login.subtitle: Pharmaceutical Supply Chain Verification
login.verifyAsPatient: Scan medicine as Patient (no login needed)

scan.cameraPermission: Camera access is required to scan QR codes on medicine packages.
scan.hint: Point at the QR code on the medicine package
scan.invalidQR: This QR code is not a valid DawaTrace batch code.

dispense.hashHint: SHA-256 of Aadhaar+BatchId+Timestamp (computed by your system)
dispense.invalidHash: Patient hash must be a 64-character hex SHA-256
dispense.failed: Failed to record dispense. Please try again.
dispense.offlineQueued: Dispense queued — will sync when internet is available
dispense.batchNotCached: Batch not found in offline cache. Please scan when connected.

verify.scanHint: Scan the QR code on your medicine
verify.failed: Could not verify this batch. Check your connection.

report.title: Report Suspicious Medicine
report.subtitle: Help protect your community. Reports earn DawaPoints redeemable at Jan Aushadhi stores.
report.reasonPlaceholder: Describe what you noticed (e.g., different color, unusual smell, broken seal...)
report.requiredFields: Please fill all fields. Reason must be at least 10 characters.
report.dawaPointsInfo: You will earn DawaPoints when CDSCO confirms this report. Redeem at Jan Aushadhi pharmacies for free generic medicines.
report.failed: Failed to submit report. Please try again.
